description: Public synthetic Aha memory benchmark cases with no private vault content.

cases.description: Direct support memory should be recalled for feedback-density insight.
cases.insight_input: Insight: feedback density may matter more than effort volume when learning. Context: I want an old note that supports this mechanism.

cases.description: Counterexample memory should challenge the current judgment.
cases.insight_input: Insight: more feedback is always better. Context: find a counterexample about bad feedback channels and calibration.

cases.description: Boundary memory should preserve no-memory workflow constraints.
cases.insight_input: Insight: when a search returns no candidates, the workflow needs an explicit checkpoint instead of pretending memory exists.

cases.description: Cross-domain resemblance should connect garden trellis and thinking scaffold.
cases.insight_input: Insight: a thinking scaffold may work like a garden trellis: it guides growth without producing it.

cases.description: Duplicate basenames should remain distinct in expected paths.
cases.insight_input: Insight: duplicate project-note basenames can hide whether I mean mentor review cadence or shipping package smoke checks.

cases.description: Alias cue should recall the north-star note.
cases.insight_input: Insight: I need a guiding constraint, almost like a compass note, to keep Aha from drifting categories.

cases.description: Source-note self-hit should be excluded before scoring old memory.
cases.insight_thought: Feedback density should point to old reviewed evidence, not count the current source note as success.

cases.description: Explicit cue can be deeper than the first few generic candidates.
cases.insight_input: Insight: the explicit cue below top-K should still be visible in deterministic benchmark evidence.

cases.description: Second-round retrieval fixture should remain in the public suite.
cases.insight_input: Insight: after memory review opens a new direction, a second round retrieval can be necessary before summary.

cases.description: No-related-memory case has no must-recall labels and checks empty-gold scoring.
cases.insight_input: Insight: this synthetic case intentionally has no related prior memory and should not tune against private labels.
